title: Terraformed Circuitry
description: Themed around Technology and Exploration with a side of Magic (cause why not!)
body:
![Terraformed Circuitry Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1191cb3edd810c245f8f4353faaff724264bc2c6.png)
Teraformed Circuitry is aimed to be a technology and exploration focused modpack with a smallish hint of magic.

Some main features
- New Technicological Advancements
- More Variety in the Overworld, Nether, and End
- Magical Dimension and Worlds to visit
- Rewarding Structures and Loot to be found Everywhere!
- Made with Multiplayer in mind


<details>
<summary>FAQ</summary>

### Why doesn't Lan play work?
I am not entirely sure, but I suggest installing a dedicated server on one of your devices and run that instead of using Lan play

### My server crashed while loading
Most likely either a client side mod or the wrong version of a mod caused the issue. Check the logs for any crash errors. The logs normally say which mod(s) are causing the issue. Also, make sure that you are using the server version of the pack

### Why isn't Simple Voice Chat working?
Simple Voice Chat has a config file that needs to be configured based on what you are using to host your server. Read this wiki for more information [https://modrepo.de/minecraft/voicechat/wiki/server_setup](https://modrepo.de/minecraft/voicechat/wiki/server_setup)

### What is the mod Steel Armor Blocks Recipes The Factory Must Grow?
Not sure why its named this when previewing the mod through Prism Launcher (might effect other launchers), but that is Ad Astra Oil Well Yeeter
</details>


<details>
<summary>Changes From Vanilla</summary>
Some basic functionalities have been changed from vanilla. This is either from a mod or from me

- Generation: Geophilic, Jaden's Nether Expansion, and about four different mods for the End change the generation
- Structures: Yung's Better X mods improve many of the vanilla structures, Biome Makover and Savage and Ravage improve the Illager structures
- Textures: Jaden's Nether Expansion changes many textures that appear in the nether
- Basic Gear: To make Tinkers Construct more useful in the early game, wooden, stone, and iron tools have their crafting recipes disabled
- Food/Health: Spice of Life: Apple Pie Addition changes food to have a diversity value, making eating a variaty of food better than just a singular type of food
- Bosses: Complete rewrite of Ender Dragon and Wither (from two seperate mods)
- Eyes of Ender: can be used in The End to find End Cities.
- Wheat: Most recipes that used wheat now require dough. This does not effect recipes that should use wheat, like haybales (though that would be kind of funny)
- Bonemeal: Now applies to more vanilla crops, like sugar cane and lily pads

Of course, there are plenty of mods that add a lot of other content, these are just the changes from vanilla

</details>
